insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great accomplishment starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also establish a foundation for building a consistent study routine. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can quickly turn your 0-day streak into a meaningful milestone, and your scores will begin to reflect the effort and dedication you put into each new challenge you take on.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
